title: Fix Welcome Popup display issues

requirements.text: Fix the WelcomePopup component so that the 'Welcome to Luminia Group' text and all popup content display correctly — ensure the heading is fully visible, properly centered, and not clipped or overflowing. The popup layout should be well-structured with adequate padding, correct font sizing using the Cormorant Garamond display font, and gold accent styling consistent with the site's luxury design system.

quotes: the pop page is not proper while showing show that welcome to luminia group

acceptanceCriteria: The WelcomePopup renders full-screen without any content clipping or overflow issues
The 'Welcome to Luminia Group' heading is fully visible, centered, and uses the correct Cormorant Garamond display font
Gold accent styling (decorative corner accents, dividers, etc.) is correctly rendered
The dismiss button is clearly visible and accessible
The popup animates in/out smoothly on first session load (via sessionStorage guard)
The popup is responsive and displays correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve the sessionStorage-based 'show once per session' behaviour
Maintain the existing dark obsidian + gold luxury design language
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall site layout or other sections
Adding new popup content or features beyond fixing the current display
